1.title: Inbound packets discarded
1.query:
timeseries count = avg(netscaler.Interface.indisc.count),
  by: { dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_interface }
| fieldsAdd python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_interface_name = entityName(dt.entity.python:com_dynatrace_extension_netscaler_interface)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20
